report.name: Customer Service Process - Initial Kaizen Attempt

categories.name: (Prepare)

attachments.name: unclear_project_rationale.jpg
attachments.description: Informal discussion about customer service issues without clear business case or strategic direction

categories.description: Inadequate preparation phase lacking structured approach and clear foundation

statements.name: Share the Business Case and link to Strategic Direction.

categories.name: Planning

attachments.name: unstructured_brainstorming.jpg
attachments.description: Unstructured brainstorming session without formal planning methodology or clear objectives

attachments.name: missing_analysis_tools.jpg
attachments.description: Workspace showing lack of proper analysis tools and structured planning materials

categories.description: Poor planning phase missing essential analytical tools and structured methodology

statements.name: Assemble team with the right knowledge and implement a project charter.
Create current state value stream map.
Determine cycle time for each step in the process.

categories.name: PDCA - Implementation

attachments.name: chaotic_workspace_attempt.jpg
attachments.description: Customer service workspace showing failed improvement attempts without systematic approach

attachments.name: no_documentation_tracking.jpg
attachments.description: Lack of proper documentation and progress tracking systems

categories.description: Ineffective implementation lacking systematic PDCA approach and proper execution

statements.name: Review team goal prior to Kaizen event.
Document and take photos of before state.
Identify the seven types of waste.
Update current state map during the event.
Meet with stakeholders and keep them informed.
Complete daily recap and present to management.
Create PDCA worksheet and update it regularly.

categories.name: Follow-Up
categories.description: Minimal follow-up with no sustainment plan or improvement tracking

statements.name: Continue to communicate and stay engaged.
Apply Kaizen to Kaizen (improve the improvement process).
Provide recognition and rewards to team members.

actionItems.title: Fundamental Kaizen Training Program
actionItems.description: Enroll team in comprehensive Kaizen fundamentals training covering basic lean principles, PDCA methodology, and project management essentials

attachments.name: kaizen_fundamentals_curriculum.jpg
attachments.description: Kaizen fundamentals training curriculum designed for beginners

actionItems.title: Business Case Development Workshop
actionItems.description: Conduct workshop to develop proper business case with strategic alignment, problem quantification, and management engagement strategy

attachments.name: business_case_workshop_agenda.jpg
attachments.description: Business case development workshop agenda and methodology

actionItems.title: Structured Planning Methodology Training
actionItems.description: Implement training on essential planning tools including A3 problem solving, SIPOC diagrams, value stream mapping, and stakeholder analysis

actionItems.title: Mentorship and Guidance Assignment
actionItems.description: Assign experienced Kaizen facilitator to provide hands-on mentorship and guidance throughout project restart and execution

actionItems.title: Project Charter and Team Formation
actionItems.description: Create proper project charter with clear objectives, team roles, timeline, and success metrics using structured methodology

actionItems.title: Basic 5S Implementation Training
actionItems.description: Provide hands-on 5S training and implementation support to establish foundation for systematic workplace organization

actionItems.title: Documentation and Tracking System Setup
actionItems.description: Establish proper documentation protocols, progress tracking systems, and visual management tools for project execution

actionItems.title: Management Engagement and Support Framework
actionItems.description: Develop formal management engagement plan with regular reviews, support mechanisms, and accountability structures
